headline: Assessing Assurant (AIZ) Valuation After Recent Share Price Strength And Growth Outlook
summary: Recent performance snapshot for Assurant stock Assurant (AIZ) has drawn fresh attention after a solid run, with the stock up about 9% over the past month and roughly 13% over the past 3 months, closing at $242.61. See our latest analysis for Assurant. Short term momentum has picked up, with a 7 day share price return of 2.54% and 30 day share price return of 9.09%. headline: Morgan Stanley Upgrades Assurant to Overweight, Raises Price Target to $285
